# CostThresholdExceeded

> Fired when spending exceeds a configured cost threshold

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| budgetId | string | yes | - |
| spent | number | yes | - |
| limit | number | yes | - |
| percentage | number | yes | - |
| organizationId | string | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `manual`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `dispatchAlert`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
